title: You Tube Poop : Gay Ganon Attacks
description:
My second You Tube Poop! For me this is a lot better than Dinner Dilemma!
At the end the clips are too fast, so here are the subtitles of the final part:
Link : What happened?
Zelda : Nothing, Link, we're just about to have a feast!
Link : Wait a minute! Where is Impa?!"
Impa : She scrubbed me!
King : Mah boy, attack Zelda.
Link : Yeah!
Zelda: NOO!

I hope you enjoy this Poop, and if you wanna know when I put new videos, subscribe!
source_pages: YTP fai da te\36412153_I miei Poop da Vallera, LA Città dei PAZZI!\page_1.html
